ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nutrients" (
  "nutrient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrient */,
  "nutrient_name" TEXT /* Name of the nutrient (e.g., Water, Energy, Protein) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the nutrient (e.g., g, kcal, kJ) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nutrient */,
  "nutrient_type" TEXT /* Type of the nutrient (e.g., proximates, macronutrients, micronutrients) */,
  "nutrient_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the nutrient (e.g., carbohydrates, protein, vitamins) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_items" (
  "food_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food item */,
  "food_item_name" TEXT /* Name of the food item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the food item */,
  "food_item_category" TEXT /* Category of the food item (e.g., fruits, vegetables, grains) */,
  "food_item_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the food item (e.g., citrus fruits, leafy greens, whole grains) */,
  "serving_size" REAL /* Serving size of the food item (e.g., 100g, 1 cup, 1 slice) */,
  "serving_size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the serving size (e.g., g, ml, oz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrient_data" (
  "nutrient_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrient data entry */,
  "food_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food item the nutrient data belongs to */,
  "nutrient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nutrient */,
  "value_per_100g" REAL /* Value of the nutrient per 100g of the food item */,
  "num_data_points" INTEGER /* Number of data points used to calculate the value */,
  "std_error" REAL /* Standard error of the value */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the nutrient data (e.g., USDA, NCCDB, user input) */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the nutrient data was collected or updated */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the nutrient data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrient_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrient_data_nutrient_id FOREIGN KEY ("nutrient_id") REFERENCES nutrients ("nutrient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrient_data_food_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_item_id") REFERENCES food_items ("food_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., nutritionist, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the role (e.g., read-only, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
